titleStmt.title: SII 33.191: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 191. (A.R. No. B 204 of 1951.) Velamakūru, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Stone at the entrance of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1451, Virōdhi, Āshāḍha śu. 11 corresponding to 1529 A.D., June 17, Thursday.

Records the installation of the deity Hamumantadēva at Velamakūru and also grant of some lands in the village for providing food offerings, and for burning perpetual lamp to the god by Rāghavaya of Konāvakoṇḍa. The gift village Velamakūru situated in Pennabadi of Guttirājya was being held as nāyankara by Dāsapanāyani Ayyavāru (who functioned) as a subordinate of Ādepa-Nāyaka, when Vākiṭi Ādepa-Nāyanimgāru was administering Gutti-rājya. Refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Lakkayadēvarāja and his uncle Salakarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1451 Agunēṭi
virodi saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 11 lu śrīma
ṁnmaharājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra
pratāpa śrīkriṣṇadēvarāya mahārāyaluṁgāru
pṛthvirājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍi vākiṭi Ādepanāyani
ṁgārki pāliṁcina guttirājyaṁ pennabaḍilōni velumakūru Āde
panāyanigāru dāsapekini Ayyavāriki yistenu dāsapanāyani Ā
yyavāru tama nāyaṁkkarānaku pāliṁstēnu śrīmanmahamaṁḍalē
śvara Aṁtyaṁbaragaṁḍa manya gajapati saṁbeṭa lakayadēva mahārājula
māma salakarājugāru konāvakoṁḍa kāmakoḍuku rāghavaya prati
ṣṭha cēsina velamakūri hanumaṁtta dēvuniki yiccina dha¨rmma śāsanaṁ pū¨rvā
na cele varimaḍiki 102 cēnu khaṁ . 1 . nagayitadhāti puṇyakāla
maṁddu nēmu dāravosi yicina varimaḍi 20 dīpārādhanaku Ā
baṁdela paṁṭṭa suṁkha rokhāla valla vi 1 kkina maḍakāsulu 4
ṁveśānu Āceṁdra¨rkaṁgā naḍaceṭaṭugānu trivā
cā dāravosi Istimigāsa Āceṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā
nu Ānubhaviṁccēdi yiṁdku yavvaru dappinānu
gaṁgalōnu gobrāṁhmala jaṁppina pāpāna bōduru tamatallidaṁḍrula
nu vāraṇāsilōnu caṁppina pāpānaboduru yīpuṇyanaku yavva
ru naḍipinānu vāniki ĀṣṭaĀIśvaryalu galugu svadattādvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpa
raṇā svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt
Digital edition of SII 33.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
